schema_app_description: Multilingual global news intelligence with timelines, topics, stability insights, and AI-assisted analysis.
hero_tagline: Clarity across languages, regions, and breaking headlines
hero_description: Veritas brings together global timelines, the topics you care about, and stability context so you can read the signal—not the noise. Personalize languages, follow clusters, and explore AI-assisted briefings grounded in real coverage.
hero_screenshot_alt: Veritas app interface showing news timelines and topic insights
features_title: Built for readers who watch the world
features_subtitle: Everything in Veritas is designed around fast scanning, trustworthy sourcing, and depth when you want it.
feature_timeline_desc: Scan a world feed or your tailored stream with publish dates, summaries, and clear article links.
feature_topics_desc: Dive into subjects with descriptions, translations, and supporting timelines that stay in sync with the news cycle.
feature_stability_desc: See risk and stability snapshots with regional breakdowns, drivers, and plain-language explanations.
feature_ai_desc: Explore predictions, topic analysis, and watch-points with confidence cues tied to underlying articles.
feature_lang_desc: Read labels, topics, and analysis in the languages you choose—built on a globally minded content model.
feature_account_desc: Sign in securely, tune notifications, languages, and topics so the app matches how you follow the world.
screenshots_subtitle: A quick tour of the Veritas experience on your phone.
screenshots_empty: Marketing captures are on the way—download the app to see the latest interface.
screenshots_alt_cluster: Screenshot: Veritas article cluster and reading view
faq_subtitle: How Veritas fits into your daily news routine.
faq_sources_q: Where does Veritas get its news?
faq_sources_a: Veritas aggregates timelines and articles from the Veritas backend API, which ingests published stories and metadata such as titles, summaries, links, languages, and regions. We surface what publishers make available; always check the original outlet for the full report.
faq_personalize_q: Can I personalize what I see?
faq_personalize_a: Yes. You can follow topics, choose preferred languages, and receive a dashboard that blends stability context with the stories that matter to you.
faq_stability_a: Stability is a structured snapshot derived from modeled scores and drivers—helping you understand regional and thematic pressure alongside headlines, not replacing professional judgment or emergency guidance.
faq_ai_a: When enabled, AI features synthesize patterns across many articles to suggest forecasts, topic outlooks, and watch-points. Outputs are informational and should be verified against primary sources.
faq_account_q: Why do I need an account?
faq_account_a: An account lets you sync preferences, topics, and tokens securely with the Veritas API. You can browse some content as a guest depending on platform settings.
faq_privacy_a: We apply data minimization, secure transport, access controls, and retention limits described in our Privacy Policy. You may exercise GDPR and CCPA rights as outlined there.
cta_subtitle: Stay informed with timelines, topics, and stability context—in the languages you read.
footer_legal_note: Informational product only—not financial, legal, medical, or emergency advice.
legal_privacy_intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Veritas (“we”, “us”) processes personal data when you use our mobile application, website, and related services (together, the “Services”). It is intended to meet GDPR transparency requirements for users in the European Economic Area and UK, and to provide the notices required by the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA/CPRA) where applicable.
legal_privacy_controller: Data controller: Veritas Technologies Ltd., reachable at thinh@thinis.de. For EU/UK residents, privacy and data-protection inquiries may be sent to the same address.
legal_privacy_data_collect: Categories of personal data we may collect include: account identifiers (such as email address or provider subject ID), authentication tokens, device and app diagnostics (crash logs, OS version), usage events (screens viewed, feature toggles), language and topic preferences, and communications you send to support. We do not knowingly sell personal information as defined under CPRA.
legal_privacy_purposes: We use this data to provide and secure the Services, personalize content, improve reliability, comply with law, and communicate with you. AI-assisted features process prompts and retrieved article metadata according to our infrastructure providers’ terms; we avoid using your messages to train public models where contractually prohibited.
legal_privacy_legal_basis: Legal bases under GDPR include performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)), legitimate interests such as fraud prevention and product improvement (Art. 6(1)(f)), and consent where required (Art. 6(1)(a)). You may withdraw consent without affecting prior processing.
legal_privacy_sharing: We share data with subprocessors that host infrastructure, deliver push notifications, or provide analytics in aggregated form. A current list is available on request. If we undergo a merger, we will require the successor to honor this Policy or notify you of changes.
legal_privacy_retention: We retain account data while your account is active and for up to 24 months afterward unless law requires longer. Logs may be kept in secure backups for 90 days. Aggregated analytics may be stored indefinitely in non-identifying form.
legal_privacy_transfers: If data is transferred outside the EEA, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses or other approved mechanisms and perform transfer impact assessments where required.
legal_privacy_rights: You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection under GDPR, and lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority. California residents may request disclosure, deletion, and correction, and may opt out of sale/sharing (we do not sell personal information). We will not discriminate for exercising rights.
legal_privacy_children: The Services are not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect their data. Contact us if you believe a minor provided information.
legal_privacy_updates: We may update this Policy and will post the new effective date. Material changes will be highlighted in-app or by email where appropriate.
legal_terms_intro: By downloading or using Veritas you agree to these Terms. If you disagree, do not use the Services.
legal_terms_license: We grant you a personal, non-transferable license to use the app in line with the platform store rules. You may not reverse engineer, scrape, or misuse the API except through documented interfaces.
legal_terms_content: News articles and images belong to their publishers. Veritas displays metadata and links for informational purposes. AI-generated summaries may contain errors; verify with original sources.
legal_terms_disclaimer: The Services are provided “as is”. We disclaim warranties to the fullest extent permitted by law. We are not liable for indirect damages except where mandatory law states otherwise.
legal_terms_law: Governing law: [Placeholder jurisdiction]. Courts: [Placeholder venue]. If you are a consumer in the EU/UK, you retain mandatory protections of your country of residence.
legal_support_intro: Our support team helps with account access, billing questions from app stores, and technical issues inside Veritas.
legal_support_hours: We typically respond within two business days. Complex investigations may take up to five business days.
legal_support_faq_link: Browse FAQs on the home page
legal_contact_intro: Use this form to open your email client with a pre-filled message. We read every note, though we cannot guarantee individual replies to all unsolicited messages.
legal_cookie_intro: This policy describes cookies and similar technologies on Veritas web properties. The mobile app may use local storage and device identifiers governed by the same principles.
legal_cookie_optout: Use browser controls to block cookies. For analytics, send a request to thinh@thinis.de to disable identifiers tied to your account.
legal_deletion_intro: You can delete your Veritas account and associated profile data using the steps below. Some records may be retained where law requires (e.g., tax or fraud logs).
legal_deletion_step1: Open Veritas on your device and sign in.
legal_deletion_step2: Go to Settings → Account (or equivalent) and choose Delete account.
legal_deletion_step3: Confirm the deletion prompt. Your session tokens will be revoked.
legal_deletion_step4: Uninstalling the app alone does not delete cloud data—always use the in-app deletion flow.
legal_deletion_step5: If you cannot access the app, email thinh@thinis.de from your registered address with the subject “Account deletion request”. We verify ownership before erasing data within 30 days.
about_intro: Veritas is an independent news intelligence project. This marketing site is authored and maintained by Thinh Nguyen.
